uncertainties.note: group header is degraded; year could be 1995
date column is not reliably legible row-by-row in the degraded scan; asset-name inventory preserved from enlarged image crop
P/PS/FS column marks are degraded; most rows appear to be sale/partial-sale transactions, encoded as Partial Sale pending row-level review
amount marks generally align with column A, but row-level exceptions may exist; best-effort default used
capital-gain checkmarks are too faint/ambiguous to resolve consistently
